worthClicking.author: @Voxyz_ai
worthClicking.why: A CLAUDE.md file distilling Karpathy's agentic coding principles hit #1 on GitHub trending with 44K stars this week — directly relevant to how you frame Claude Code workflows and pitfalls.

worthClicking.author: @coreyganim
worthClicking.why: Concrete productized-service blueprint: $999 front-end / $10K back-end using Fathom + Claude + Gamma — a tight sales enablement template worth stealing or referencing.

worthClicking.author: @jlehman_
worthClicking.why: lossless-claw 0.9.2 fixes three cache-breaking bugs and stabilizes compacted context across concurrent agents — operational detail that matters if you're running multi-agent Claude setups.

worthClicking.author: @steipete
worthClicking.why: MCPorter 0.9.0 adds per-server tool filtering and OAuth fixes — incremental but useful if MCP toolchains are part of your agent stack.

worthClicking.author: @katexbt
worthClicking.why: Vercel breach actionable checklist (rotate secrets, check build logs) — a recurring theme that has now hit 270K views, suggesting real exposure for devs shipping on Vercel.

voices.why: Actively shipping lossless-claw with detailed release notes on multi-agent cache and concurrency fixes — rare operational depth on Claude agent infrastructure.
Demonstrates concrete AI-to-revenue pipelines with specific numbers — useful signal for sales enablement and productized service angles.
Structured thinking on LLM prompt strategy for performance marketing — bridges AI product and distribution interests.

examples: finance/tariff breaking news with no AI angle
vague engagement-bait posts (could be us, basically)
genomics viral content and red-light therapy jokes

fading.theme: AI quality gaps (Gemini harness vs. model)
